case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VICTOR RODOLFO FLORIAN GODOY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAY-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GODOY, VICTOR RODOLFO FLORIAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.23 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GODOY, VICTOR RODOLFO FLORIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GODOY, VICTOR RODOLFO FLORIAN $1,400.23 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,480.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-28-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VICTOR RODOLFO FLORIAN GODOY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE FOR A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2019 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-11-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
